compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can trust batch-5 test files (105-126) are SIGPIPE-safe
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace all echo|grep -q patterns in batch 5 (files 105-126 alphabetically)
**Why**: Completes SIGPIPE-safe coverage for the final 22 test files
**Scope**:
- IN: 22 files in batch 5
- OUT: All other batches

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, zero echo|grep -q patterns remain in the 22 batch-5 files
  ← Satisfies: "Zero echo ... | grep -q patterns remain in tests/"
- When this story is complete, all tests in the 22 batch-5 files pass
  ← Satisfies: "All replaced patterns preserve original matching semantics"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Same flag-to-bash mapping as batch 1
